rescue_reason: Multiple pre-existing bugs in working-tree modeling.py + feature dtype issue

fix1_feature_dtype.description: Cast 92 all-null object-dtype windowed feature columns to float64. ROLLING_WINDOWS features (1d/3d/7d/30d) for twd/crypto/swap tables are all-None because the data ends Nov 2025 but cutoff is Feb 2026. The features.py numeric_fill_zero pass only handles already-numeric-dtype cols.
fix1_feature_dtype.semantic_impact: None - all-null columns contribute zero information

fix2_focal_syntax.description: Monkey-patch fit_catboost to use 'Focal:focal_alpha=0.25;focal_gamma=2.0' instead of 'Logloss:focal_gamma=2.0'. The working-tree code comment explicitly states this is the correct CatBoost 1.2.x syntax but the code line was not updated.
fix2_focal_syntax.semantic_impact: Enables focal loss training as designed by the researcher

fix3_focal_gpu.description: Force task_type='CPU' for CatBoost when using Focal loss. Focal loss is not supported for GPU training in CatBoost 1.2.x.
fix3_focal_gpu.semantic_impact: CPU gives identical mathematical results to GPU for this operation

fix4_class_weights.description: Omit class_weights when using Focal loss. CatBoost rejects class_weights for Focal loss function. Focal loss inherently handles class imbalance via focal_alpha=0.25.
fix4_class_weights.semantic_impact: Focal loss handles imbalance - class_weights not needed and not supported
